ddls:
CREATE TABLE "admissions" (
  "admission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each admission */,
  "sii_app_no" TEXT /* SII application number */,
  "adm_category" TEXT /* Admission category (e.g., JOSAA/CSAB-2020) */,
  "online_reporting_round" TEXT /* Online reporting round (e.g., OR-01) */,
  "admission_round_id" INTEGER /* ID of the admission round */,
  "institute_roll_no" INTEGER /* Institute roll number */,
  "section" TEXT /* Section (e.g., CS-A) */,
  "sub_section" TEXT /* Sub-section (e.g., CS-03) */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Name of the student */,
  "father_mother_name" TEXT /* Father's or mother's name */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student */,
  "pwd" TEXT /* Whether the student has any disability */,
  "program" TEXT /* Program the student is admitted to (e.g., COMPUTER ENGG) */,
  "admission_status" TEXT /* Status of the admission (e.g., pending, accepted, rejected) */,
  "admission_date" TEXT /* Date when the admission was processed */,
  "admission_comments" TEXT /* Any additional comments or notes related to the admission */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Home address of the student */,
  "high_school_gpa" TEXT /* High school GPA of the student */,
  "entrance_exam_score" INTEGER /* Score in the entrance exam */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admissions_sub_section FOREIGN KEY ("sub_section") REFERENCES sub_sections ("sub_section_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admissions_online_reporting_round FOREIGN KEY ("online_reporting_round") REFERENCES online_reporting_rounds ("online_reporting_round_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admissions_section FOREIGN KEY ("section") REFERENCES sections ("section_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admissions_program FOREIGN KEY ("program") REFERENCES programs ("program_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admissions_adm_category FOREIGN KEY ("adm_category") REFERENCES admission_categories ("adm_category_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the program */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the program in years */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department offering the program */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sections" (
  "section_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each section */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program the section belongs to */,
  "section_name" TEXT /* Name of the section */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the section */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("section_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sections_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sub_sections" (
  "sub_section_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sub-section */,
  "section_id" INTEGER /* ID of the section the sub-section belongs to */,
  "sub_section_name" TEXT /* Name of the sub-section */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the sub-section */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sub_section_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sub_sections_section_id FOREIGN KEY ("section_id") REFERENCES sections ("section_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Name of the student */,
  "father_mother_name" TEXT /* Father's or mother's name */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student */,
  "pwd" TEXT /* Whether the student has any disability */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the student */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Home address of the student */,
  "high_school_gpa" TEXT /* High school GPA of the student */,
  "entrance_exam_score" INTEGER /* Score in the entrance exam */,
  "admission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the admission record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_admission_id FOREIGN KEY ("admission_id") REFERENCES admissions ("admission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admission_categories" (
  "adm_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each admission category */,
  "adm_category_name" TEXT /* Name of the admission category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the admission category */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the admission category is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("adm_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "online_reporting_rounds" (
  "online_reporting_round_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each online reporting round */,
  "online_reporting_round_name" TEXT /* Name of the online reporting round */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the online reporting round */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the online reporting round is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("online_reporting_round_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admission_rounds" (
  "admission_round_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each admission round */,
  "adm_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the admission category the round belongs to */,
  "online_reporting_round_id" INTEGER /* ID of the online reporting round the round belongs to */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the admission round */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the admission round */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the admission round is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admission_round_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admission_rounds_adm_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("adm_category_id") REFERENCES admission_categories ("adm_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admission_rounds_online_reporting_round_id FOREIGN KEY ("online_reporting_round_id") REFERENCES online_reporting_rounds ("online_reporting_round_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, faculty, student) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user for secure authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
